action.reasoning: Observation: 3-way ensemble (best+v3+v4) got 0.6587, worse than best+v3 (0.6686). v4 hurt the ensemble. Have 2.3h, 10 iters. Best test=0.6686. Analysis: Adding more models doesn't always help—need quality not quantity. Try ensembling best+v4 (skip v3) to see which 2-way pair is best. Or try best alone+v4 alone—v4 had val_bacc 0.853 (highest). Let me first try best+v4 ensemble. If that beats 0.6686, great. Otherwise stick with best+v3. Decision: Submit eval with best.pt + v4.pt ensemble.
